Event: Tropical Mole-opoly

Other locations the gear can be found

Mystic Dragon
Conquistador Plate Mail

For the duration of the battle, when the unit restores health, they heal all allies for 25% of that amount.
Once in a while, all the healing received by the unit is increased by 50% for 3 sec and the unit restores 35% of their max health for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
